{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Union bounty
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Union]] issues bounties.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
